contentProfile.topic: Silent letter spelling patterns and high-frequency word recognition
contentProfile.primarySkill: Orthographic memory for silent-letter patterns and visual recognition of high-frequency vocabulary
contentProfile.assignmentFormat: Two-group spelling list: pattern-focused production targets and sight-word recognition targets

capturedContent.title: Benchmark Advance Spelling Unit 9 Week 3
capturedContent.rawText:
Benchmark Advance Spelling
Unit 9 Week 3

Silent Letters
sign
know
write
thumb
comb
gnat
knock
knife
wrong
climb

High-Frequency Words
among
building
circle
decided
finally
heavy
include
nothing
special
wheel

wordGroups.label: Silent Letters
evidence: Teacher heading 'Silent Letters' signals a spelling pattern focus requiring production recall
Words contain silent consonants (kn-, wr-, -mb, gn-) requiring explicit orthographic memory

wordGroups.label: High-Frequency Words
evidence: Teacher heading 'High-Frequency Words' signals recognition/reading fluency goals
These words are Benchmark Advance sight vocabulary for reading fluency, not spelling production drill
No silent-letter pattern ties these words together as a spelling cohort
